characters.name: Alejandro
characters.description: Alejandrowas a rival drug dealer who harassedNancy Botwinbefore having sex with her and joining her upcoming business. A little while later he left the drug business behind and became a Pro-Baseball player.

characters.name: Alejandro
characters.description: Alejandrowas a rival drug dealer who harassedNancy Botwinbefore having sex with her and joining her upcoming business. A little while later he left the drug business behind and became a Pro-Baseball player.

characters.name: Andy Botwin
characters.description: Stevie Ray(nephew)Nancy(sister-in-law)Unnamed child (withMaxeen Vanderlest)Leni Botwin(daughter) Andrew "Andy" Botwincame to the show to give a helping hand to a family initially in distress after the tragic death ofNancy's husbandJudah, his brother. He lives with the family and helps out withSilasandShaneas their Uncle Andy. Andy Botwin first appears in "Fashion Of The Christ", when the family is awoken by a fire alarm and come downstairs to him in the kitchen cooking. Andy is old friends with Conrad, and on a visit to get some pot, is made aware of Nancy's business. He encourages her to open her bakery "cover business," but has the wrong impression as to what his part will be, and Nancy shuts him out. He attempts to start his own business, but immediately after picking up an ounce of weed, he's busted by a bike cop and is court ordered to attend NA. He receives a letter from the government with orders to report for deployment to Iraq, and begins searching for ways to avoid going to war. He decides to attend school to be a rabbi and works to get the head of the local hebrew school to take him seriously. He successful completes a Torah that impresses her and is accepted to the school on a trial basis.

characters.name: Anika
characters.description: Anika was/is a waitress at Andys restaurant in Ren Mar. After having a daughter together, Andy and Anika share custody of their daughter Leni amicably and have remained friends. Leni is 3 years old at the time of the season finale.

characters.name: Aram Keshisyan
characters.description: Aram Keshisyan(Armenian:Արամ Քէշիշեան) is the leader of an Armenian drug trafficking ring in Agrestic. WhenNancy Botwinand her associates start their drug business in his neighbourhood, he offers them cakes and then asks them to leave, threatening to kill them if they don't. However, Nancy's new husband, D.E.A agentPeter Scottsonarrests Keshisyan and his associates. Heylia James visits him in jail and asks him a favor: the murder of Peter, in exchange for Nancy's pot. Keshisyan accepts the deal and sends Armenian gangsters to kill Peter.

characters.name: Bubbie
characters.description: Bubbie is first introduced in Season 4 when Nancy and the family escape the fire in Agrestic.

characters.name: Captain Roy Till
characters.description: Roy Till was the homosexual lover of fellow DEA Agent Schlatter. He was assumingly murdered by Ignacio & Esteban after being caught snooping around Nancy's Ren Mar home by Ignacio; as he was trying to get revenge upon Cesar and  "Sucio" for their part in torturing and murdering Agent Schlatter.

characters.name: Celia Hodes
characters.description: Celia Hodes is a suburban mother and frenemy of Nancy's. She constantly criticizes her overweight-lesbian (and even hinted towards transgender) daughter Isabelle, and is stuck in an unhappy marriage for the first season and a half. Celia also has another daughter named Quinn, who, until the end of Season 4, had only appeared in the pilot episode. After that she's been mentioned as having been sent to boarding school after Quinn found out her mother was spying on her and knew she had slept with Silas. Quinn is almost never mentioned anymore. In the Season 4 finale her mother visits her in Mexico, only to get drugged, captured and held for ransom by her. At the beginning of season 5, Celia is eventually released from the ransom after no one has responded. Throughout the season, Celia's jealousy for Nancy continued to grow. At the end of the season, Celia begins to dress as Nancy and starts to sell marijuana with a new team. After the fifth season, Celia was never heard of ever again. What happened to her is somewhat up-in-the-air.  On the commentary of the series finale, "It's Time", the creators reveal Celia journeyed into Mexico and was killed by a car bomb from Mexican-gangsters.  Other sources of the show said that, "Celia went back to Agrestic, and fulfilled her desire to be like Nancy by becoming a drug dealer." It is later revealed from a bonus video on the season 8 DVD that she became the leader of a Mexican cartel. Celia is full of hate. This hate fuels most of her actions, which are either to pissDougoff or just be a bitch to people around her. After getting cancer, she sees the good in life and starts getting more nice and bubbly. From her city council term to her prison sentence, Celia gets more impulsive, resulting in a alcohol and later cocaine addiction. She is out of her luck, and spends her last appearances in the show being unhappy. Celia had a terrible relationship with her own mother. Sometime before the show, she met Dean and gave birth to her daughters with him. Before marrying Dean, she worked in a furniture store and lived in a townhouse. Celia is full of hate. This hate fuels most of her actions, which are either to pissDougoff or just be a bitch to people around her. After getting cancer, she sees the good in life and starts getting more nice and bubbly. From her city council term to her prison sentence, Celia gets more impulsive, resulting in a alcohol and later cocaine addiction. She is out of her luck, and spends her last appearances in the show being unhappy.

characters.name: Clinique
characters.description: Cliniquewas an associate ofU-Turn, who had sex withSanjaytofuck the gay out of him. At U-Turn's funeral it was revealed that she was pregnant, she gave birth in season four. In season four Sanjay asks Clinique to marry him. In the season eight finale it is revealed that Sanjay and Clinique are happily married. Given the fact that she tried to corrective rape Sanjay, shes a terrible person. Given the fact that she tried to corrective rape Sanjay, shes a terrible person.

characters.name: Conrad Shepard
characters.description: Conrad Shepard, Nancy's first serious business associate, had very strong feelings for Nancy for a long time. After they became a real couple, Nancy had to leave him whenAgresticburned down. Nancy and Conrad reunite inseason 8.

characters.name: David Bloom
characters.description: David Bloom was Nancy's fourth and last husband and Stevie's adoptive father. He was a rabbi and helped set Nancy on the straight and narrow path. Unfortunately, his life following their encounter was short, like all of her romantic partners, and he died in a car accident shortly thereafter. He was portrayed by David Julian Hirsh.

characters.name: David Bloom
characters.description: David Bloom was Nancy's fourth and last husband and Stevie's adoptive father. He was a rabbi and helped set Nancy on the straight and narrow path. Unfortunately, his life following their encounter was short, like all of her romantic partners, and he died in a car accident shortly thereafter. He was portrayed by David Julian Hirsh.

characters.name: Dean Hodes
characters.description: Dean Hodes is Isabelle's father and Celia's ex-husband. He cheated on Celia because he felt like they had a distant relationship, they were constantly at odds with each other and disagreeing about how to raise their daughter, Isabelle. Dean loves Isabelle and tries to make the best possible life for her and himself after he splits up with Celia and Agrestic burns down. Dean is a lawyer who smokes pot. He is often made fun of for his body shape. He likes smoking pot with fellow stoner, Douglas Wilson. As revenge for cheating, during the first episodes of season 1, Celia cuts his hair and makes him bald while he is sleeping. On the 6th episode of season 7, "Object Impermanence", Dean runs out of Heylia's house with his pants down, stopping Heylia from shooting and killing Nancy and Silas. Later, he is questioned for his sexual relationship with Heylia; he denies the relationship and claims that he is helping her with legal issues within her business and is living with her and Conrad.

characters.name: Devon Rensler
characters.description: Devon Renslerwas a school bully atAgrestic Elementary. He made fun ofShane Botwinregularly, giving him a series of nicknames, including: Fruit, Fruit Punch, Strange Botwin, Vampire, Lipstick and Orphan Boy. He also knocked him over during a soccer match. Shane retaliated, first by throwing a can of soda at him, then attacking him with a paint gun, for which he got suspended, and finally by writing a gangsta rap about killing him. He is also described as a "fuckwad" by Nancy and Silas.

characters.name: Dimitri Ravitch
characters.description: Dimitri Ravitchis a drug dealer and a lover ofNancy Botwin. He is also the brother ofZoya Ravitch, a former cell mate and lover ofNancy Botwin. At the end ofSeason Seven, he is arrested and sent to jail for crimes unrelated to anything that happened during the season.

characters.name: Doug Wilson
characters.description: Former AccountantFormer Drug DealerFormer CoyoteFormer Wall Street TycoonLeader of His Own Cult Doug is the happily irresponsible accountant,Agresticmunicipal council chair and friend ofNancy. Doug also becomes business partners with Nancy and dedicates his life to his city council seat, until he tries to destroy the city ofMajesticwhenSullivan Grofftakes over. Doug has a wifeDanawho he loves very much but won't have sex with him. He had an affair withCeliabriefly but loves Dana too much to keep seeing Celia. Doug also has a gay teenage sonJoshwho appeared only in thepilot episodeand the series finale. He was mentioned several times by Doug in Season 4 who reveals that he knows Josh is gay. Doug can be seen as a dumb yet a manipulative and evil person when it comes to revenge. Doug's manipulation has been shown in his new religion featured in the season finale. As usual in the show he's most likely stoned, when he's not stoned he gets grumpy and means that everything sucks. This appears in an episode where he and Dean decided to quit smoking pot for a while, so they could figure out an evil plan to kill Celia. He's also awful at trying to insult someone, even though he's really trying. As you can see Doug is the ultimate stoner. He has brains but gets sidetracked by weed and is always looking for fun. characters.name: Emma Karlin
characters.description: Emma Karlinis the love interest ofSilas BotwininSeason Seven.  She is a young woman who claims to be a disgruntled Pouncy House employee, but actually she wants to work for Silas and Nancy so that she can gather information about them and take it back to Pouncy House. She is the boss of Pouncy house.

characters.name: Esteban Reyes
characters.description: Steven Ray Botwin(Son)Nancy Botwin(Wife)Shane Botwin(Stepson)Silas Botwin(Stepson) Esteban Carlos Reyes(1960-2012) He was Nancy's 3rd Husband. He's the corrupt mayor of Tijuana Mexico, and has deep cartel connections. He acts as the main antagonist of seasons 4 and 6.

characters.name: Gretchen
characters.description: Gretchenwas a girl inShane Botwin's class atAgrestic Elementary. After bullying her for a while, she asked him to be her boyfriend,After realizing that they both had feelings for each other, they were going out until the end of season two. Where it is unknown of what happened to them.

characters.name: Guillermo García Gómez
characters.description: Guillermo García Gómezwas originally introduced as the head of the Mexican gang who was doing business withU-Turn. In the end of seasonthree,Nancypromised him half of herMILFmoney for full protection from blackmailers and rival dealers. After he burned downAgrestic, while trying to help Nancy, he offered her cash in return for sex. She later learned that he was actually part of a much larger organization, run byEsteban Reyes. The organization controls the border from 324 to 666 (hence the "Tres Seis" name of the organization). Tres Seis exports cocaine and prostitutes to the United States, and imports weapons to Mexico. Guillermo was ratted out by Nancy, and then busted by the D.E.A. He's the secondary antagonist of seasons 4, 5, and 6.  Guillermo spent the first half of season five in a US prison for drug smuggling. During this time Guillermo sent a message toNancyand met her threatening to kill her and eventually relents when he learns she is engaged toEsteban Reyesand carrying his child.  Eventually he is moved to mexico and set free by the intervention of Nancy, to engage his help to kill Pilar. However Guillermo actually works for Pilar so strings Nancy along to free himself... He also appeared in the last three episodes of season 8.

characters.name: Helen Chin
characters.description: Helen ChinwasDean Hodes' tennis coach, then had an affair, which everybody seemed to know about except forCeliauntilQuinnmade her watch a video recorded with anannycam. Celia later confronted her and they went out drinking together.

characters.name: Helen Chin

characters.name: Heylia James
characters.description: HeyliaisConrad'saunt and the former supplier forNancy. Heylia has a no-nonsense approach to both life and weed dealing, acting as a point of authority in both her personal and business affairs. She has two children,Vaneetaand Keeyon, who also work for her. Helia is introduced as Nancy's supplier inEpisode 1. She is seen showing some compassion towards Nancy in early episodes when Nancy comes up short due to family problems, but is also able to recognize her quick turnover. When Nancy gets busted by the Valley State Security Guard inEpisode 9and Heylia learns that it was Conrad and his crew who beat up him inEpisode 10, Heylia orders Conrad to stay away from Nancy. Conrad, tired of not being heard by Heylia, retaliates and goes into business with Nancy in Season 2.

characters.name: Hiram Wells
characters.description: Hiram Wellsis a wealthy, gay man living inAgrestic, who has a thing for teenage boys. He had an affair withDoug Wilson's sonJosh.

characters.name: Hiram Wells

characters.name: Isabelle Hodes
characters.description: (Formerly Isabel Hodes) Isabel Hodes (now known as Isabelle Hodes) is Celia's daughter, who frustrated her mother with her open lesbianism before her sex change. Celia is also frustrated with her daughter's unwillingness to lose weight. That frustration peaks when Isabel becomes an advertising model for Huskaroo's before her transition, a clothing line for plus-size kids. She becomes close friends with Shane Botwin in season 3, as they bond over their dysfunctional families. Isabel resents her mother, but seems to enjoy her father's company. She is seen throughout seasons 1 - 5 up until her final appearance in the season 5 finale where she was going to help Doug and Dean get revenge on Celia for stealing their pot. In the series finale, after a ten-year gap, Dean reveals to Shane that Isabel had a sex change operation and is now named Bruce.

characters.name: Jill Price-Grey
characters.description: Jill Price-Grey is Nancy's older estranged sister and the temporary guardian ofSteven Ray BotwininSeason Seven. Her issues mostly arise around wanting to keep Stevie away from Nancy. She is married toScott Price-Grey, who is kinder to Nancy than Jill is. She was born in 1963. She is played byJennifer Jason Leigh.

characters.name: Joseph Mohammed
characters.description: Joseph Mohammedwas one ofHeylia James's suitors. A pious member of the Nation of Islam, he exhibited an unmistakable disdain for Nancy Botwin, as well as criticize Vaneeta's preference for pork and having a baby out of wedlock . He didn't know that Heylia was a drug dealer and later inadvertently helped her evade capture by theDEA.
